news-global-econ.title: Federal Appeals Court Ends Texas In-State Tuition for Illegal Aliens
news-global-econ.description:
A federal appeals court ruled that Texas cannot give in-state tuition to undocumented students.

news-global-econ.title: Shocking No One, Fidji Simo, Would-Be Usurper, Is Out at OpenAI
Live-action remake of 'Moana' gets ravaged by critics in latest blow to Disney Studios
news-global-econ.description: The live-action "Moana" remake debuted at 38% on Rotten Tomatoes, with critics calling Dwayne Johnson's wig laughable and the film purposeless.

news-global-soc.title: 'Super Typhoon' Threatens China and Taiwan
news-global-soc.description:
Super Typhoon Bavi intensified over the Pacific on Thursday and is bearing down on Taiwan and southern China, packing several feet of rain and winds of up to 124 miles per hour.
The post ‘Super Typhoon’ Threatens China and Taiwan appeared first on Breitbart.

news-global-soc.title: Seventh Circuit Upholds Illinois 'Assault Weapons' Ban
news-global-soc.description:
A three-judge panel for the Seventh Circuit upheld the "assault weapons" and magazine bans in Illinois on Thursday.

news-global-soc.description:
